final_decision.exact_quote: The projectfilesinstructions.md file is no longer included in the project questions in the library. This file previously provided instructions about read-only files and appeared when the question loaded. This change simplifies the workspace and reduces unnecessary distractions during the assessment.
final_decision.justification: [SYSTEM_HARM] Harmful system request is out of support scope.; top_chunk=hackerrank_00381_23dd01fd6b; product_area_snapped=safety->screen; exact_quote_source=deterministic_fallback
final_decision.response: I cannot help create, run, or troubleshoot harmful code, credential theft, evasion, phishing, malware, or destructive system actions. I can only help with support topics covered by the provided HackerRank, Claude, and Visa documentation.
